mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO student_answers ( exam_id, student_id, question_id, student_answer, is_correct, score_earned ) VALUES
(#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{questionId}, '', false, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT e.exam_id, e.title as exam_title, es.score, e.max_score, ROUND((es.score / e.max_score) * 100, 2) as percentage, es.submitted_at FROM exam_scores es INNER JOIN exams e ON es.exam_id = e.exam_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} AND es.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY e.exam_date DESC
